name: Jena Digital – Scrape, Check, Chunk & Upsert

parameters.query: ={{ "SELECT (SELECT file_hash FROM document_records WHERE filename = '" + $json.url.replace(/'/g, "''") + "') AS db_hash" }}

={{ "INSERT INTO document_records (filename, file_hash) VALUES ('" + $('Extract & Hash').item.json.url.replace(/'/g, "''") + "', '" + $('Extract & Hash').item.json.content_hash + "') ON CONFLICT (filename) DO UPDATE SET file_hash = EXCLUDED.file_hash, updated_at = NOW()" }}
